channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'Tough night for Chelsea, mate' — Amazon Alexa+ has arrived in the UK, and it's got more than just a British accent
item.description: The AI-powered virtual assistant has been learning all about British life, accents, and particularly football.

item.title: 20% Off LG Promo Code & Coupons | March 2026
item.description: Save 20% with an LG promo code today, plus up to $1,000 off appliances, 40% off bestselling TVs and monitors.

item.title: 30% Off Canon Promo Codes | March 2026
item.description: Save an extra 10% or 30% with Canon coupon codes, plus up to $1,600 on cameras, printers, and more this March.

item.title: Best Buy Discount Codes and Deals: Up to 60% Off
item.description: Save at Best Buy with 10% back in rewards for new cardmembers, free 2-day shipping with My Best Buy Plus, daily deals, price match guarantee, and more.

item.title: Nike Promo Codes and Deals: 30% Off
item.description: Check out our deals for Nike this month, including 15% off select purchases.

item.title: 10% Dell Coupon Codes | March 2026
item.description: Get 10% off with verified Dell promo code, plus today’s coupons for up to $600 off laptops, Alienware monitors, and all things tech.

item.title: 50% Off Home Depot Promo Codes | March 2026
item.description: Save up to 50% today with the latest Home Depot promo codes for appliances, power tools, and more this March.

item.title: 30% Off Samsung Promo Code | March 2026
item.description: Save 30% or 10% with Samsung coupon codes, up to $1,000 on appliances, plus limited-time deals on the Galaxy Z Fold7, Flip7, and S25.

item.title: 25% Off Dyson Promo Code | March 2026
item.description: Get 25% off with a Dyson coupon code, plus save up to $600 with discounts on vacuums, $150 off Airwraps, and more.
